blockingIssues.description: Worker-side screenshot masking only performs UTF-8 byte substitution, so actual JPEG milestone screenshots can still contain rendered credential text even after `maskSecretsInBytes` runs.
Blocked runs still persist only the generic `GUARDRAIL_VIOLATION` code, dropping the specific breached-rule detail before it reaches the run record.
Org-scoped `settings.modelConfig` rows are persisted but never consulted by `packages/ai`, so admin model-configuration changes have no runtime effect.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a verification-only completion path for cases where a worker is assigned a backend feature that is already implemented on the branch before the worker starts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `guardrail-enforcer-convex` review found the code already present in commit `8a80588`, while `.factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md` only describes RED/GREEN implementation work. The worker could only return a partial handoff even though targeted validators passed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document how to provision or seed an Admin-role account for manual verification of admin-only routes during frontend work and user testing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `admin-diagnostics-page` and `settings-frontend-page` reviews flagged that the mission instructions only mention creating accounts through `/signup`, with no documented path to obtain admin permissions for `/admin/diagnostics` or `/settings` validation.
